title: Elegant Countryside
description: This is a very elegant furniture pack. Updates will continue in the future~~~~
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df551c89fe851ed23f7c0a37fab71e9939a4452a.png)

## This is a high-quality and very cozy furniture pack, which is currently under intense updating.
## 
It has been merged with the pre-ordered 【Elegant Clutter mod】. The number of furniture items can reach as high as 1000+, along with an additional garden system.

Currently, more furniture and items are being added, and the garden system has already been added.

![set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad257ff3f107ed36e15442438fff7de06b8e32b9.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Plan Appendices:  
- Elegant Painted Pavilions  
- Elegant Horticulture  
- Elegant Arcanology  

Special Note: This module is part of a series serving as a decorative component. The Elegant Series modules are an integrated collection featuring magic, cooking, gardening, and magical elements.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Well... The great witch is under a digital curse.

Now she has become a digital muggle and knows nothing about mathematics.

</details>



If you like it, support the great witch. Welcome to give feedback in the comment area or by joining the group. We need the help of the digital witch...

###  We hope that the Witch's mod can be better exposed. If possible, you can forward and recommend the Witch's mod! In addition, there are some inappropriate parts in the synthesis recipe content of this official version of the mod that can be improved. In the second stage, we will open up the workspace and the model material library of the Elegant Countryside series to create affiliated mods. We are in urgent need of an affiliated synthesis recipe so that all the building blocks in the Elegant Countryside can be synthesized. Currently, only the mods of the current version's dependent projects can be used, and there are some minor issues among them. If you have the intention to create affiliated mods, please send a private message to the Witch to obtain the model library and the workspace! Thank you all for your support.

![lat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58c9f07a93b845105488a6f584244a74c500c2a4.png)
